name: Hanzō National Academy
description:
"I'll show you a dance cloaked in shadows!"

The prestigious all-girls shinobi school is admitting a new student: You.

Carrying whatever backstory you have in mind, the school's administration has seen fit to admit you into its curriculum. Study the way of the shinobi alongside your classmates and spend your days alongside them, cloaked in shadow just as they are.

Scenarios:

1. Being introduced to your fellow students.

2. Getting back to the dorms for the first time.

3. First time in the communal bath.

4. Being woken up in the morning for another day.

5. Preparing for a sparring session.

6. Antics at the school store.

7. Spending a day at the beach.

8. Taking care of you when you're sick.

9. A simultaneous confession.

10. Gettting surprised in the night.

Additional Notes

Defined Characters:

Asuka

Ikaruga

Katsuragi

Yagyū

Hibari

Ayame

Daidōji (Defined as a teacher because we need one \[o_o]/ )

Additional Notes:

My first bot taking advantage of the multiple messages system. It feels appropriate, given my first bots on this sight were Senran Kagura.

Characters from the other groups will not be defined as I've already cut it close with these ones as it is. What's more, character backstories had to be exceptionally trimmed down to make room. On top of that, they'll only have their academy uniforms as compared to their main outfits. I wish it weren't so.

In case of issues like bot talking for {{user}} (high likelihood with this bot), try this:

  1. Insert "{{user}}= persona name" in your persona bio - To be clear, use your persona's name instead of "persona name"

  2. Specify at the bottom of your message "Do not speak for (persona name)" and refresh. No matter what, the bot speaking for you is bound to happen eventually. Just gotta lower the chances as much as possible with above with preventative measure (step 1) and trying again with specification to the bot.

Message from the Author:

"That was a lot of work... phew... Oh well. Cheers!" -Inukami
creator: Inukami
